commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an internal code-mode namespace registry and QuickJS bridge, reference docs, live repro scripts, tests, CI shard/watchdog changes, and a small explicit-agent session-key adjustment.

PR surface: Source +641, Tests +609, Docs +185, Config +1, Other +881. Total +2317 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current head calls createCodeModeNamespaceRuntime before prepareSource, so a visible namespace createScope can run before invalid import or disabled-language input fails. I did not execute the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the validation-order defect; maintainer review remains needed for final security/session boundary acceptance.

target.title: feat: add internal code mode namespaces
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an internal code-mode namespace registry and QuickJS bridge so host-owned namespace globals can be exposed inside `exec` while the model-visible surface stays `exec`/`wait`.
- Gate namespaces by plugin-owned run catalog tools, serialize only safe enumerable scope values, reject forged/unsafe paths, preserve namespace runtime across `wait`, and clear namespace registrations on plugin rollback.
- Route namespace function calls through the normal `ToolSearchRuntime.call` lifecycle with policy hooks, approvals, abort handling, telemetry, and suspend/resume instead of direct host callbacks.
- Expand the code-mode reference docs with maintainer-grade namespace registry coverage: lifecycle, registration shape, ownership and visibility, serialization rules, cleanup, prompt guidance, and test checklist.
- Keep GitHub/API-style integrations as separate owner plugins; no public plugin SDK namespace API in this PR.
- Add a fake Fictions live harness plus a standalone live Docker repro comparing regular tool mode with code namespace mode.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (45 passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (24 passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (29 passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/realtime-transcription/websocket-session.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (8 passed)
- `node --import tsx scripts/repro/code-mode-namespace-live.ts --tasks=1 --modes=code-namespace` (post-rebase live OpenAI, code namespace risk-audit passed)
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --allow-env OPENAI_API_KEY --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- 'OPENCLAW_CODE_MODE_LIVE_TASKS=1 bash scripts/repro/code-mode-namespace-live-docker.sh'` (remote run `run_7a735aa03ef0`, live Docker passed)
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
- `pnpm check:architecture`
- `pnpm protocol:check`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check && pnpm format:docs:check && pnpm lint:docs && pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/reference/code-mode.md`
- `pnpm docs:check-links docs/reference/code-mode.md`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` (clean after fixing accepted findings)
- GitHub exact-head checks on `0a8f77caeb04bea3e234b3ecdf28eecda9727481`: CI rerun green, CodeQL green, CodeQL Critical Quality green, OpenGrep green, dependency guard green, label/dispatch/real behavior proof green.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: code mode can expose internal host-owned namespace globals inside QuickJS while preserving normal tool policy, approval, telemetry, abort, and suspend/resume behavior. The Docker script is an explicit live source-level repro, not a cataloged release/package Docker E2E lane.

Real environment tested: local macOS checkout; AWS c7a.8xlarge Crabbox run `run_7a735aa03ef0`; OpenAI Responses API with `gpt-5.4-mini` and a real `OPENAI_API_KEY` passed through Crabbox env forwarding; exact-head GitHub CI on `0a8f77caeb04bea3e234b3ecdf28eecda9727481`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: targeted code-mode, command, agent-command, and realtime-transcription Vitest; local live code-namespace run; remote live Docker run through `scripts/repro/code-mode-namespace-live-docker.sh`; lint; architecture; protocol check; docs index/format/lint/MDX/link checks; branch autoreview; and exact-head GitHub CI/CodeQL/OpenGrep/dependency guard.

Evidence after fix: post-rebase local code-namespace-only live run passed risk audit in 4,851 ms with 3 model turns, 2 top-level tool calls, and 1 service call. Remote live Docker proof passed both modes on the same risk-audit task: regular mode 1/1 in 2,937 ms with 4 top-level tool calls and 4 service calls; code-namespace mode 1/1 in 2,279 ms with 2 top-level tool calls and 1 service call. Docs validation passed for the expanded namespace registry reference section. OpenGrep's changed-path websocket payload finding was fixed with a focused regression test pass, and the final OpenGrep check is green.

Observed result after fix: namespace globals are visible only when the owning plugin id has the required catalog tools in the run; same-named tools from other owners do not expose the namespace; raw host functions are rejected; namespace calls route through catalog tool execution; forged namespace paths are rejected; namespace calls survive suspend/resume; the live Fictions namespace completed the task with fewer service calls than regular mode. The docs now explain the registry lifecycle, owner boundary, cleanup model, and test checklist directly in `docs/reference/code-mode.md`.

What was not tested: no real third-party plugin namespace integration, because this PR intentionally does not add a public plugin SDK namespace API.
target.author: steipete
